about.title: About Us
about.description1: Welcome to Gîte Auberge Zahi Bouiblane, your ideal destination to relax and discover the magic of the Middle Atlas. We are the Zahi family, welcoming you to our home in the heart of the majestic Mount Bouiblane.
about.description2: Our project stems from our desire to provide a true Moroccan hospitality experience, blending mountain simplicity with authentic comfort. Here, you are more than a visitor; you are part of the family.
about.description3: Our goal is to provide a peaceful haven for everyone seeking serenity away from the city noise, whether you are a hiking enthusiast or simply want to enjoy the beauty of the nature.
